title: Po_core reconstruction_patch v1
description: PR-007 design + runtime contract. Represents one deterministic patch PROPOSAL produced by the ControlledReconstructionExecutor (Layer 2) from a reconstruction_plan_v1 operation. A reconstruction_patch is not rewritten content: execution_mode is const 'patch_proposal_only', content_rewrite_applied is const false, and original_content_preserved is const true. It references the plan (plan_id), the causing decision (decision_id), and the source operation (operation_id). See docs/contracts/RECONSTRUCTION_PATCH_V1.md.

plan_id.description: References the reconstruction_plan_v1 this patch was derived from.

decision_id.description: References the po_self_decision that caused the plan.

operation_id.description: References the planned_operation this patch fulfills.

target_step_id.description: The semantic_step targeted by the operation.

patch_status.description: 'not_applicable' when the target semantic_step could not be found.

execution_mode.description: This is critical: no content_rewrite mode exists in PR-007.

original_content_hash.description: Full SHA-256 hex digest (64 lowercase hex chars) of the target step's original content, computed before and re-verified after patch creation.

original_content_preserved.description: Critical guarantee: the original semantic_step content was never touched.

content_rewrite_applied.description: Critical guarantee: PR-007 never applies a content rewrite.

placeholder_text.description: Deterministic proposal-only text. Must not read as final rewritten content.

trace_refs.description: Should include the SemanticProfileComputed, PoSelfDecisionMade, and PoSelfReconstructionPlanned event IDs when available.
